name: chapter-card
title: ChapterCard
description: Chapter-title scene block with a numbered eyebrow ('01 The setup'). The number fades in first in accent rose, the chapter title rises with a calm blur-reveal, and an optional accent underline punctuates the title. Composes FadeIn, BlurReveal, and Underline.
pickWhen: a calm chapter / section divider beat — "Chapter 2: …" — that should breathe before the next scene lands.
